⚠️  WARNING: The "update:workflow" command is deprecated.

Publishing workflow FLuUDg0bWUtxH6BR with current version
Please use: publish:workflow --id=FLuUDg0bWUtxH6BR

Note: Changes will not take effect if n8n is running.
Please restart n8n for changes to take effect if n8n is currently running.
---
USAGE
  $ n8n update:workflow

FLAGS
  -h, --help        Show CLI help
  --active <value>  Active state the workflow/s should be set to
  --all             Operate on all workflows
  --id <value>      The ID of the workflow to operate on

DESCRIPTION
  [DEPRECATED] Update workflows - use publish:workflow or unpublish:workflow instead

EXAMPLES
  $ n8n update:workflow --all --active=false
  $ n8n update:workflow --id=5 --active=true
